title: collate: COST_REPORT.md path fallback fails when sprint.path absent + (unknown) attribution in usage events
description: Two bugs in forge/tools/collate.cjs (v0.6.11). Bug 1: resolveDir fallback uses only sprintId and sprintId.split('-').pop() as candidates — for IDs without hyphens (e.g. S31) both are identical, neither matches sprint_31_slug/ naming convention, creating a stub S31/ dir. Bug 1 is a regression/incomplete-fix of BUG-006 (which added sprint.path precedence but left fallback broken for user projects where sprint.path is absent). Bug 2: usage event files written to .forge/store/events/{sprintId}/ contain only bare token counts with no taskId/role/model attribution; collate renders all fields as (unknown). The filename itself encodes attribution but loadSprintEvents ignores it. Linked to GitHub issue #25.
